frame_label: Dress Code: Traditional = Respectable, Other = Questionable
generated_comment: Honestly, Indian wear suits girls much better yaar. Saree or even a simple salwar looks more decent and graceful—these ultra-western outfits just send the wrong vibe sometimes.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it links women's clothing to decency and character, implying western clothes make a woman less respectable. It encodes the 'traditional = respectable' and backhanded dress-policing surface manifestation.
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 27. A junior employee at a tech startup in Bengaluru. You are in the office cafeteria having lunch with three male colleagues after your female engineering manager just led a very strong all hands presentation. One colleague says she was impressive. You are responding and giving your actual opinion of her.
